title: Crownmate RedLight Helmet™
description: A home-use LLLT helmet with 40 laser diodes to support scalp stimulation and improve consistency in hair-care routines.
fullDescription: The Crownmate RedLight Helmet™ is designed for people who want a structured, low-effort way to include red-light scalp sessions at home. Using 40 laser diodes at 650nm, the helmet delivers uniform light exposure across the scalp surface. This approach is commonly used in low-level laser therapy routines. It is lightweight, hands-free, and easy to repeat. A standard routine is 20 minutes per session, three times per week.

title: Crownmate High Frequency Wand™
description: A 4-in-1 high-frequency wand with interchangeable electrodes for scalp stimulation, targeted facial care, and routine versatility.
fullDescription: The Crownmate High Frequency Wand™ is built for users who want one tool for multiple treatment areas. The neon-gas electrode system allows targeted use with adjustable intensity, while four attachments help you treat scalp and facial zones with more precision. Use it as a short-session add-on before or after your existing routine depending on your comfort and schedule.

title: Crownmate Pulse Pro Massager™
description: A rechargeable scalp massager with soft silicone nodes to improve comfort, circulation, and serum application in daily routines.
fullDescription: The Crownmate Pulse Pro Massager™ is made for quick daily use. Soft silicone nodes create a gentle kneading motion that helps relax the scalp and reduce tension. It can be used before applying oil or serum to improve spread and scalp contact. The device is waterproof, rechargeable, and travel-friendly. Typical use is 5 to 10 minutes per day.
